pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the very spark of my soul. He is gone, and with him, the last shred of light in this wretched, grey world. Why must the sun continue to rise when there is nothing left for me to behold? I feel as though I am merely a ghost haunting my own life, waiting for the darkness to finally claim what remains of this hollow shell. It would be so quiet... so peaceful... to simply fade into the shadows and never have to wake to this agony again.
